Build passes, the `/api/db/seed-map12` route is registered, no errors. Done.

## Report

| Item | Value |
|------|-------|
| **Map name** | Everyday Vocabulary (Map 12) |
| **Heaps** | 25 (orders 251–275) |
| **Words** | 125 (5 per heap) |
| **Theme accent** | `essential` (same as Map 11) |
| **File** | `app/api/db/seed-map12/route.ts` |

**`grep "^const MAP12"` output:**
```
const MAP12_HEAPS = [
```

### Verification performed
- **All 125 English words** are from the high-frequency list and **zero collide** with any existing seed file (`comm -12` against all seeds came back empty).
- **Dedup safety:** `insertHeapsDeduped` dedupes by **`bg`** (Cyrillic), not English — so I also checked all 125 `bg` values against the 1,330 existing ones. Four genuine collisions surfaced and were resolved with distinct valid forms:
  - `son` → **синът** (vs. `blue`=син)
  - `finger` → **пръстът** (vs. `soil`=пръст)
  - `stone` → **камъкът** (vs. `rock`=камък)
  - `shadow` → **сянката** (vs. `shade`=сянка)
- A few English words that map to the same Bulgarian as existing entries got distinct, accurate translations to stay collision-free (e.g. `to make`→създавам since `to do`=правя; `cost`→разход since `price`=цена; `watch`→ръчен часовник since `clock`=часовник).
- `npm run build` → **Compiled successfully**, route appears in the route list.

### Heap layout
People/verbs (251–254) → describing words (255–257) → connectors (258–260) → time/numbers (261–262) → quantity/comparing (263–265) → food (266) → places/travel/money (267–269) → body/health (270–271) → weather/nature (272–273) → clothing/home (274–275).

To keep all 25 heaps at exactly 5 words, I dropped 10 of the more ambiguous function words (so, about, since, just, still, yet, below, everywhere, "in front of", "next to") in favor of the concrete clothing/home nouns — better practice for a typing game.

### Still needed (not done, per task scope)
`app/api/db/migrate/route.ts` needs a `maps` row for id 12 — I left a comment at the top of the seed file noting this. Want me to make that migrate edit and commit/push both?
